inventory_note: Finite vorticity-sup norm time integral supports continuation but does not exhaust all full-NS singularity mechanisms.
Velocity space-time integrability criteria support regularity under added bounds and remain conditional.
Critical L3 endpoint control rules out blowup under the criterion but is not a universal mechanism-exhaustion theorem.

Small critical-space data produce global control in that regime, not an exhaustive large-data Clay solution.
